query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as supplierCost,
  bi.description as billingItem,
  bi.lineAmount as revenue,
  ROUND((bi.lineAmount - CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL(10,2))) / bi.lineAmount * 100, 1) as marginPct
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8JR3KM','SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
ORDER BY marginPct ASC;

SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as supplierCost,
  bi.description as billingItem,
  bi.lineAmount as revenue,
  ROUND((bi.lineAmount - CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL(10,2))) / bi.lineAmount * 100, 1) as marginPct
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S8JR3KM','SHB64AC','S72C54J','SHU42OX','SGVQT30','S1UMC04','SEEV150','SKY3MLC','SSE3JV7','SZR96SE','SGBHVJV','S66U54A')
ORDER BY marginPct ASC;
